markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[GrowthX pitches its AI-driven SEO service to Priority Gold.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Priority Gold's Challenge:** The business is 95% paid traffic (200-300k visitors/mo) and needs a long-term organic strategy to prepare for AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** An end-to-end service using proprietary AI workflows to publish 5 articles/week, aiming to become the "best answer" for AI search queries.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Partnership Model:** An 8-week Strategy Sprint (10-20 articles) validates content quality and the roadmap. Clients can opt out before committing to a 12-month contract for Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [**Goal:** Shift traffic mix to \~20% organic, generating more educated leads who are better prepared for the required broker call.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

## Topics

### Priority Gold's Challenge & Goal

  - [**Current State:** 95% paid traffic (200-300k visitors/mo) with a 0.5-0.75% conversion rate (1,500 leads/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Primary Audience:** 55+ demographic.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**Business Model:** 99% of conversions require a broker call, creating an "information gap" that content can help bridge.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Goal:** Shift traffic mix to \~20% organic to reduce paid reliance and generate more educated, higher-intent leads.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Driven SEO Solution

  - [**End-to-End Service:** Strategy, content creation (5 articles/week), and a platform to track AI search visibility against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Core Methodology:** Use proprietary AI workflows, not just ChatGPT, to become the "best answer" for audience questions.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
    1.  [**Strategy Sprint (Weeks 1-3):** Create audience artifacts (personas, pain points) to personalize AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
    2.  [**Growth Execution (Week 4+):** Publish content at scale, with Priority Gold reviewing drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [**Content Types:** Educational guides, glossaries, listicles, comparisons, and programmatic content.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### Partnership Model & Proof Points

  - [**Phased Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks):** Delivers 10-20 articles to validate content quality and the roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
      - [**Phase 2: 12-Month Contract:** Commences if Priority Gold opts in after the sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [**Decision Criteria:** Clients decide based on content quality and the roadmap, not short-term traffic, as organic growth takes time.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [**Proof Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** 3x traffic in 6 months (20k → 70k/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [**Sentinel One:** Built a "Cybersecurity 101" educational hub.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [**Biologica:** Adapted workflows for medical compliance and professional review.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Priority Gold:** Review the proposal and follow up via email with questions or to schedule a follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/8r866FMFBhe7SK-zzjdvf5veCXzZq8ow?tab=summary&timestamp=2181.0)
